case_title: FARMERS INSURANCE EXCHANGE VS. THE HERTZ CORPORATION ET AL

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF NOV-08-2017 CONTINUED TO DEC-20-2017 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
